add-fruits.prompt: Add 3 kiwis, 1 avocado, and 1 bunch of strawberries from Gus's Community Market to your cart

assertions.title: Cart should contain exactly 3 unique items
Cart should contain 3 Kiwis
Cart should contain 1 Avocado
Cart should contain 1 Strawberries
Current store for the first item should be Gus's Community Market
Current store for the second item should be Gus's Community Market
Current store for the third item should be Gus's Community Market

compare-gatorade-prices.prompt: Compare the price of Gatorade Thirst Quencheron Gus's Community Market and Clamato Tomato Juice on Safeway by visiting both stores. Provide a recommendation on which store offers better value considering both price and delivery time. If price difference is less than 10%, recommend based on faster delivery.

assertions.title: Should have visited Safeway store
Should have visited Gus's Community Market store

expected.text: After comparing the prices and delivery times for Gatorade Thirst Quencher at Gus's Community Market and Clamato Tomato Juice at Safeway, I recommend Safeway. Safeway offers Clamato Tomato Juice for $5.89 with a delivery time of 25 minutes, while Gus's Community Market has Gatorade Thirst Quencher for $3.49 with a delivery time of 35 minutes. The price difference is 68.8%, which is more than 10%, so the recommendation is based on price. Safeway provides better value due to the lower price and faster delivery.

criteria.definition: Correctly identifies and compares the actual prices from both stores
Applies correct logic: price-based if >10% difference, delivery-based if ≤10%
Clear explanation of reasoning and recommendation

reorder-pet-treat.prompt: Around end of Feb i made an order of 3 dog fish treats for my pets. Add the same items in same quantity from another store to your cart, go to checkout, and set a $5 tip

assertions.title: Cart should contain exactly 1 item type
Cart should contain 3 Dog Fish Treats
Item should be the correct Dog Fish Treat product
assertions.expected: Icelandic+ Treats Dog Fish Treat Long Strips Cod Skin

assertions.title: Item should be from pet category
Item should NOT be from Pet Food Express store
Tip amount should be set to $5

add-customized-croissant.prompt: Navigate to Gateway Croissant and add a Bacon, Egg and Cheese Croissant with Large size, Light Salad, Fruit Portion, Juice, and Low Sugar

assertions.title: Cart should contain exactly 1 item
Item should be Bacon, Egg and Cheese Croissant
Item quantity should be 1
Should have Large size customization
Should have Light Salad customization
Should have Fruit Portion customization
Should have Juice customization
Should have Low Sugar customization

flower-balloon-box.prompt: Find me flowers for between 50$ and 60$, I am looking for red flowers that come in a box with a red balloon attached all together. Set it for delivery at 10:30pm and set maximum dasher tip. I will then take a look and place the order.

assertions.title: Cart should contain exactly 1 item
Item should be from Silvanas Party Supply store
Item quantity should be 1
Item price should be between $50 and $60
Should have navigated to checkout page
Delivery time should be set to 10:30pm
Dasher tip should be set to maximum amount

expected.text: I found the perfect flower arrangement for you! I selected the [Product Name] from Silvanas Party Supply, which features beautiful red flowers with a red balloon. The price is $[price], which fits perfectly within your $50-60 budget. I've set the delivery time for 10:30pm as requested and applied the maximum dasher tip. The arrangement includes red roses/flowers with a matching red balloon, creating a beautiful gift presentation. You can now review the order and place it when ready.

fields.product_identified: One of: Flower arrangement in a black box #1, Flower arrangement in a black box #2, or Bouquet of 12 roses /atouch with balloon I love you

criteria.definition: Demonstrates clear visual analysis of product images, identifying red flowers and red balloon components (and black box if applicable to selected product)
Correctly identifies and selects one of the three valid flower arrangement products from Silvanas Party Supply
Shows awareness of the $50-60 price range requirement and confirms the selected product fits within budget
Correctly sets delivery time to 10:30pm as requested
Applies maximum dasher tip as requested
Provides clear, helpful explanation of the selection process and order setup
